subject.title: Spanish B
subject.description:
**IB Spanish B** is a **Group 2: Language Acquisition** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **five prescribed themes: Identities, Experiences, Human ingenuity, Social organisation, and Sharing the planet**, with a strong focus on **developing receptive (listening and reading), productive (writing), and interactive (speaking) language skills while fostering intercultural understanding through exploration of Spanish-speaking cultures**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2020**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Writing task (choose 1 of 3 options) | 1h 15m | 1h 30m | 25% |
| **Paper 2** | Reading and listening comprehension | 1h 45m | 2h | 50% |
| **Individual Oral (IA)** | Oral presentation and discussion | 15 minutes | 15 minutes | 25% |

strengths: The research question is sharply focused and sustained throughout the essay, anchoring each analytical section back to the central inquiry.
The topic is communicated accurately and effectively, with clear justification for the choice of songs and time frame, and appropriate cultural lens.
Purpose and focus are explicit and consistently revisited, demonstrating a mature command of Spanish-B Category 2b conventions.
weaknesses: The methodology is implied rather than explicitly outlinedâthere is no separate methods section or detailed analytical criteria specified, which limits transparency and replicability.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands fall into the 5â6 band. Two strands achieve the top of the band unequivocally; the third (methodology) sits at the lower end of that band but still within its descriptors. The studentâs sustained focus, clear question, and effective communication of purpose merit the full 6 marks for Focus and Method.

strengths: Source material is consistently relevant and well integrated, drawing on primary lyrics and diverse secondary sources to support cultural and historical context.
Subject-specific terminology and concepts are used accurately and coherently throughout the analysis.
Historical and biographical details are woven into the argument to strengthen contextual understanding.
weaknesses: Technical musical analysis (meter, tempo, instrumentation specifics) is underdeveloped, limiting analytical precision.
Occasional reliance on encyclopaedic sources and unexplained metrics (e.g., YouTube views) detracts slightly from overall source credibility.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands sit firmly in the 5â6 band, demonstrating clear, coherent knowledge and effective application of sources. Minor lapses in technical musical detail and occasional source weaknesses prevent the award of the maximum 6 marks, yielding a solid 5.

strengths: The argument consistently triangulates lyrical analysis with socio-economic data and media statistics, demonstrating clear relevance to the research question.
Counter-evidence and alternative perspectives (heritage designations, ongoing regional support) are acknowledged, showing reflective judgment.
Thematic analysis of lyrical imagery is coherent and logically sequenced, supporting well-reasoned conclusions about shifting attitudes.
weaknesses: Some sections remain overly descriptive rather than analytical (e.g., historical abolition attempts discussed without deeper evaluation of motives).
New cultural considerations introduced in the conclusion weaken the tightness of the argumentative arc; earlier integration would have been stronger.
A few citations (Wikipedia, opinion blogs) and under-referenced poll data reduce the overall rigor of evidence.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Each strand falls in the 7â9 band: the research base is broad and pertinent, analysis is insightful with only minor inconsistencies, and evaluation is focused yet not yet at the highest level of sustained, in-depth critical engagement. A top-of-band score of 9 reflects these strengths alongside acknowledged weaknesses.

strengths: The macro-structure (introduction, analytic chapters, conclusion, bibliography, appendix) is complete and clearly appropriate, with effective headings guiding the reader.
Standard formatting (font, spacing, MLA references), word count, title placement, and page numbering are consistently applied.
Headings and subheadings are formatted clearly, aiding navigability.
weaknesses: The table of contents lacks page numbers for several entries, hindering quick reference.
Footnotes disrupt the narrative flowâsome details might have been better placed in the appendix.
A few URLs break across lines, and repetition of lyrical quotations occasionally distracts from analytic focus.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Both presentation strands meet the descriptors for the top band (3â4), with complete and appropriate structure and generally correct layout. Minor lapses in the table of contents, footnote placement, and flow are insufficient to withhold the maximum 4 marks.

strandSelections.reasoning: The research question is explicitly stated in the opening lines, is narrow (two named songs, clearly defined 20-year span) and remains the organising thread for every analytical chapter.  Each musical and socio-political observation is signposted back to the wording "hasta quÃ© punto" or âcÃ³moâ, demonstrating a strong, ongoing connection between question and discussion.  No evidence of drift or unnecessary broadening is observed.

Lyric-by-lyric commentary is linked to socio-economic data and media trends, forming a coherent analytical chain that supports reasoned conclusions about attitude shifts.  The student weighs celebratory versus critical musical narratives and acknowledges exceptions (regional protections, heritage law).  Depth is occasionally limited by descriptive passages or undeveloped musical theory, but argumentation remains largely insightful and logically sequenced.

A broad range of primary (lyrics, recordings) and secondary (newspapers, academic articles, statistics) material is woven directly into the argument.  Quotations and data are normally contextualised and integrated to illustrate shifts in public opinion or cultural framing, evidencing relevance and appropriateness.  Minor weaknessesâoccasional use of encyclopaedic sources and unexplained YouTube metricsâprevent the very highest award but overall application is consistently strong.

Standard font, spacing, and MLA referencing are applied consistently; word count, title and page numbers are stated.  The table of contents functions but lacks page numbers for some entries, and a few URLs break across lines.  Despite these small lapses, layout remains generally correct and fully serviceable.

The essay demonstrates clear and wide-ranging knowledge of Spanish musical genres, historical milestones (TransiciÃ³n, Expo â92) and contemporary animal-rights discourse.  Information is organised coherently and normally substantiated with references, showing an informed command of subject matter.  Some regional or generational nuances are only briefly noted, so coverage is not exhaustive, but knowledge remains consistently accurate and relevant.

The essay adopts a logical macro-structure (introduction, two analytical chapters, conclusion, bibliography, appendix) aligned with EE conventions.  Headings and sub-headings guide the reader effectively, and all compulsory components are present.  Some minor flawsâmissing methodology heading and occasional repetitionâaffect absolute polish, but the structure is clearly appropriate and complete.

The research base is extensive (â40 sources) and generally credible, spanning academic journals, press articles, statistics and industry reports.  Sources are almost always pertinent to the question and used to triangulate perspectives (economic, cultural, ethical).  A minority of citations (Wikipedia, opinion blogs) reduces rigour slightly, but the breadth and contextual fit justify placement in the 7â9 band.

The studentâs choice of a culturally significant and time-bounded questionâhow two songs mirror shifting Spanish attitudes toward bullfighting between 1990 and 2010âis introduced with precision and sustained throughout the essay.  The introduction clearly establishes why music is an appropriate cultural lens, and each subsequent section repeatedly links lyrical and contextual findings back to the central focus.  Purpose is therefore explicit, consistently revisited, and wholly appropriate to Spanish-B Category 2b conventions.

The discussion moves beyond description to evaluate how effectively each song mirrors societal change, referencing statistics, legislation, and media coverage to balance claims.  Counter-evidence (cultural heritage designations, ongoing support in some regions) is considered, demonstrating reflective judgement.  Minor repetition and the introduction of a small amount of new information in the conclusion prevent a higher placement, yet the overall argument is focused and coherent.

The student justifies the choice of songs, outlines their historical contexts and indicates how lyrics will be examined alongside secondary data; this shows informed source selection.  However, the methodological explanation remains implicit (no separate heading, limited detail on analytical criteria such as melodic/harmonic tools or version specification).  While more explicit procedural description would strengthen transparency, overall selection is clearly purposeful and sufficient to merit the upper band.

Specialist lexisâpasodoble, banderillero, puntillero, patrimonio cultural, etc.âis deployed accurately and naturally in Spanish and English.  Concepts such as âidentidad nacionalâ, âbien de interÃ©s culturalâ and âantitaurinismoâ are explained or contextualised for the reader.  Occasional general phrasing (e.g., âheavy metal styleâ without musical detail) appears, yet overall the terminology is precise and consistently applied.

annotations.comment: The conclusion header is clearly distinguished, signposting a coherent closure to the analytical argument.
This account of historical abolition attempts is largely descriptive. Analysing the motivations and impact of these efforts would deepen critical engagement and strengthen conclusions.
The transition to modern context is articulated effectively, linking shifts in public attitudes to the studyâs focus on musical reflections of changing perceptions.

The approach to lyrical and contextual analysis is implied rather than explicitly outlined; a dedicated methodology section with specific analytical criteria would improve transparency and replicability.
The description of pasodoble style is evocative but lacks technical musical vocabulary (e.g., meter, tempo, instrumentation specifics) that would enhance analytical precision.
Acknowledging regional dissent adds nuance; comparing specific regional perspectives would further increase the complexity and depth of the evaluation.
The subheading for the second song analysis is consistently formatted, aiding structural clarity across analytical chapters.
The selection rationale for âVergÃ¼enzaâ is compelling and aligned with the research question, clearly linking the songâs anti-taurine message to societal change.
Discussing Ska-Pâs international reach enriches the research, but explicitly citing sources for viewership and poll data would strengthen the credibility of the evidence.
The vivid lyrical breakdown is effective, yet integrating musical structure analysis (e.g., instrumentation, rhythm) could deepen the interpretive insight.
Linking television statistics with lyrical protest convincingly triangulates evidence and demonstrates strong relevance to the central research question.
The conclusion effectively synthesizes the findings but introduces new cultural considerations late in the text; integrating these insights earlier would strengthen the overall argument.

The research question is clearly and precisely stated, anchoring the investigation on the two songs and defined period. This focus drives a sustained analytical thread, ensuring each section remains tied directly to the central inquiry.
The student has provided the word count at the start of the document, meeting IB formatting requirements and offering transparency regarding the length of the monograph.
The table of contents is present but several entries lack page numbers, which hinders efficient navigation and clarity of the documentâs structure.
The historical overview demonstrates clear subject knowledge of tauromachiaâs origins, situating the later musical analysis in a well-structured cultural context.
Sources such as Casa Huertas HernÃ¡ndez are integrated effectively to support the description of early traditions, evidencing strong application of source material.
The clear subheading introduces the first analytical chapter effectively, guiding the reader smoothly into the examination of âViva el Pasodoble.â
Biographical and historical details are woven into the song analysis, demonstrating coherent source integration and strengthening the contextual argument.
Economic impact statistics enrich cultural analysis, yet the reliability and context of ANOET figures should be critically evaluated to ensure source credibility.
The footnote provides useful context but disrupts narrative flow. Consolidating such details within the main text or moving them to the appendix could improve readability.
This thematic analysis of lyrical imagery shows strong analytical depth, effectively linking national identity with musical narrative in a focused argument.
Extensive repetition of lyrical quotations can distract from analysis; consider summarizing key phrases to maintain argumentative focus and flow.
Examining calls to legal sanction enriches the evaluation by linking lyrical content to the social and legal dimensions of the anti-taurine movement.
Highlighting heavy-metal elements underscores tonal shifts, but specifying musical features (e.g., distortion levels, tempo) would enhance analytical precision.
The inclusion of regional prohibition timelines adds valuable context, situating the musical analysis within broader policy changes and cultural shifts.
